title: Infiscml secrets manifest
description: Declares a tree of Infisical vault folders and, per folder, exactly which keys to pull into a gitignored .env.secrets file next to this manifest.

folderNode.description: A folder in the tree: `raw` + `aliased` declare the keys pulled from this folder; `/`-prefixed children are subfolders.

aliased.description: Canonical vault key -> the extra env var name(s) a build/runtime expects (e.g. POSTHOG_PROJECT_TOKEN -> VITE_POSTHOG_KEY).

fetch.description: Read strategy for this profile; replaces the root fetch when set

profiles.description: Named alternate trees; a profile tree replaces the root tree when --profile is set

skipWhenEnv.description: Skip Infisical in CI when all listed env vars are already set

stubInCi.description: When true, write a stub .env.secrets in CI without calling Infisical

output.description: Output filename only (no path separators), relative to this manifest directory

fetch.description: Read strategy. 'folder' (default) pulls whole folders and selects the declared keys locally. 'keys' fetches only the declared keys per folder; in CI the vault transmits nothing else (per-key REST reads). A per-profile 'fetch' replaces this one.

optionalKeys.description: Declared keys allowed to be absent in this environment; a notice is logged instead of failing

environments.description: Per-environment policy keyed by Infisical env slug (development, preview, production)
